name: Maggie Appleton
description: Visual essays on digital gardens, AI, and the philosophy of knowledge. One of the best thinkers on how we build and share ideas online.

name: Andy Matuschak
description: Working notes on learning, memory, and knowledge architecture. Home of the evergreen notes concept.

name: Tom Critchlow
description: Writing on indie consulting, digital gardening, and building a less performative presence on the web.

name: Neerlandistiek
description: Online academic journal for Dutch language and literary research. Running since 1992.

name: Ness Labs
description: Mindful productivity, knowledge management, and learning in public. Good thinking on how to tend a mind garden.
